creator: roman@xpert.com
text:
On Fri, 10 Nov 2000, Daniel Lang wrote:
..snip..
> I could crash the machine reproducable, just by calling
> find /the/vinum/fs/mountpoint
Please, contact grog@lemis.com with some crash analysis
http://www.vinumvm.org/vinum/how-to-debug.html
Unfortunately I used those disks for raid-1 setup, so I cannot post any
additional information.
So, if Greg will need some additional information you will be able to
supply it.
Any ideas when this thing began? Our server worked flawlessly for one
month, then the problems began. I suspect that it had something to do with
some fs fill watermark.
What scsi (if any) adapters do you have?
I had one guy (and me) look at the stack trace and it looks like the stack
was smashed.
At least the man page's BUGS section should state that RAID-5 is not
stable yet.

--Roman Shterenzon, UNIX System Administrator and Consultant
[ Xpert UNIX Systems Ltd., Herzlia, Israel. Tel: +972-9-9522361 ]
